basic_details.job_title: Central Bank of India Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline for Faculty, Office Assistant and More Posts
basic_details.short_information: The latest Central Bank of India Recruitment 2026 has been announced for Faculty, Office Assistant, Attendant, and Watchman-Gardener posts! Published on the official website, this recruitment drive offers 7 openings for eligible candidates. Applicants within the age group of 22 to 40 years and possessing educational qualifications ranging from 7th pass (for Watchman/Gardener) to Graduate/Post Graduate degrees (depending on the post) can apply offline on or before 25 May 2026. Find all details about the Central Bank of India new vacancy 2026, including eligibility, application procedure, and no

application_fee.details: No application fee is mentioned in the official notification.

age_limit.details: Faculty: 22 - 40 years Office Assistant: 22 - 40 years Attendant: 22 - 40 years Watchman/Gardener: 22 - 40 years

qualification.education_qualification: Minimum 7th pass for Watchman/Gardener, Matriculate for Attendant, Graduate for Office Assistant, Graduate with specific degrees for Faculty.
qualification.details: Faculty: Graduate (any i.e. Science/Commerce/Arts/Post Graduate); however preference will be given to MSW/MA in Rural Dev. /MA in Sociology /Psychology /B.Sc. (Veterinary, Horticulture, Agriculture, Agri Marketing)/B.A with B.Ed. etc. Excellent communication skills in the local language is essential, fluency in English & Hindi will be an added advantage. Skills in typing in Local Language are essential, typing skill in Hindi/English will be an added advantage. Previous experience as Faculty will be preferred. Should be resident of the same State, preferably same or nearby district/residing at the head quarter of RSETI Centre. Office Assistant: Graduate viz. BSW/BA/B.Com with computer knowledge. Fluent in spoken and written local language. Fluency in Hindi and English will be an added advantage. Proficient in MS Office (Word and Excel). Etc. Skill in typing in local languages is essential, typing skills in English an added advantage. Should be resident of the same or nearby district/residing at the head quarter of RSETI Centre. Attendant: Matriculate. Ability to Read and write the local language. Should be resident of the same or nearby district/residing at the head quarter of RSETI Centre. Watchman/Gardener: Should have passed 7th Standard. Experience Preferably in agriculture/gardening/horticulture. Should be resident of the same or nearby district/residing at the head quarter of RSETI Centre.

salary_details.pay_scale: Faculty: Rs. 30000/month, Office Assistant: Rs. 20000/month, Attendant: Rs. 14000/month, Watchman/Gardener: Rs. 12000/month
salary_details.details: Faculty: Rs. 30000/- per month Office Assistant: Rs. 20000/- per month Attendant: Rs. 14000/- per month Watchman/Gardener: Rs. 12000/- per month

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for Central Bank of India Various Posts Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website:centralbank.bank.in .
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates.
Check all details carefully before submission.
Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed.
Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 25-05-2026.
Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the Central Bank of India recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the application for the Central Bank of India recruitment is 25th May 2026. Ensure your application reaches the designated address before this date.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available in this recruitment?
faq.answer: There are a total of 7 vacancies announced for various posts including Faculty, Office Assistant, Attendant, and Watchman/Gardener in this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q3. What is the minimum qualification required for the Watchman/Gardener post?
faq.answer: The minimum qualification required for the Watchman/Gardener post is the successful completion of 7th Standard. Experience in agriculture or gardening is preferred.

faq.question: Q4. What is the age limit for applying to these posts?
faq.answer: The age limit for all the posts (Faculty, Office Assistant, Attendant, Watchman/Gardener) is between 22 to 40 years.

faq.question: Q5. What is the application mode for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application mode for this Central Bank of India recruitment is offline. Candidates need to send their filled application forms to the specified address.

faq.question: Q6. What is the salary for the Faculty post?
faq.answer: The selected candidate for the Faculty post will receive a monthly salary of Rs. 30,000/-.

faq.question: Q7. What are the required qualifications for the Office Assistant post?
faq.answer: For the Office Assistant post, candidates must be a Graduate (BSW/BA/B.Com) with computer knowledge and proficiency in the local language.

faq.question: Q8. Where should I send the application form?
faq.answer: The application form should be sent to the Regional Manager/Co-Chairman, Dist. Level RSETI Advisory Committee (DLRAC), Central Bank of India, Regional Office Gwalior, Madhya Pradesh situated at Naka Chandravadani, Jhansi Road, Gwalior, MP: PIN – 474001.

faq.question: Q9. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: As per the information available, there is no application fee mentioned for any category in this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q10. What is the selection process for these posts?
faq.answer: The selection process for these posts will primarily involve a personal interview. Candidates will be shortlisted based on their performance in the interview.
